name: United Explorer Card
perks: First checked bag free for you and one companion (saves up to $140 per round trip)
2x miles on United purchases, dining, and hotels
50,000 mile bonus after spending $3,000 in first 3 months
2 United Club one-time-use passes per year
25% back as statement credit on United in-flight purchases
Expanded award availability on United flights
drawbacks: Miles locked to United MileagePlus ecosystem (and Star Alliance partners)
No United Club membership (just one-time passes)
Award availability can be limited on popular routes
